mapper.select: SELECT (CASE WHEN (RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD, '100') = '100' THEN (CASE WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE THEN '400' WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_START_DATE THEN '100' ELSE '999' END) -- 미접수(100)일 경우 : 미접수(100) WHEN (RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD, '100') = '200' THEN (CASE WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE THEN '400' ELSE '200' END) -- 미제출(200)일 경우 : 미제출(200) WHEN getVendorRfxProgressCode(RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) = '250' THEN (CASE WHEN SYSDATE > RQHD.RFX_END_DATE THEN '400' ELSE '200' END) -- 작성중(250)일 경우 : 미제출(200) ELSE getVendorRfxProgressCode(RQVN.RFX_PROGRESS_CD, RQHD.RFX_END_DATE) END) AS VENDOR_PROGRESS_CD FROM STOCRQHD RQHD JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = (CASE WHEN #{ses.userType} = 'S' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{VENDOR_CD} END) AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT (CASE WHEN A.ALL_VENDOR_CNT = A.GIVE_UP_CNT THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS COMPULSION_FLAG FROM ( SELECT COUNT(VN1.VENDOR_CD) AS ALL_VENDOR_CNT , MAX((VN2.GIVE_UP_CNT, 0)) AS GIVE_UP_CNT FROM STOCRQVN VN1 LEFT JOIN (SELECT SUB.GATE_CD, SUB.BUYER_CD, SUB.RFX_NUM, SUB.RFX_CNT , COUNT(SUB.VENDOR_CD) AS GIVE_UP_CNT FROM STOCRQVN SUB WHERE SUB.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND SUB.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND SUB.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND SUB.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND SUB.RFX_PROGRESS_CD = '150' -- 견적포기 AND SUB.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY SUB.GATE_CD, SUB.BUYER_CD, SUB.RFX_NUM, SUB.RFX_CNT) VN2 ON (VN1.GATE_CD = VN2.GATE_CD AND VN1.BUYER_CD = VN2.BUYER_CD AND VN1.RFX_NUM = VN2.RFX_NUM AND VN1.RFX_CNT = VN2.RFX_CNT) WHERE VN1.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND VN1.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND VN1.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND VN1.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND VN1.DEL_FLAG = '0' GROUP BY VN1.GATE_CD, VN1.RFX_NUM, VN1.RFX_CNT ) A WHERE 1 = 1

SELECT RQHD.RFX_NUM , RQHD.RFX_CNT , RQHD.BUYER_CD , RQHD.DEPT_CD , GETBUYERDEPTNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.BUYER_CD, RQHD.DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS BUYER_DEPT_NM , RQHD.PROGRESS_CD , RQHD.RFX_TYPE , GETCODENAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, 'M070', RQHD.RFX_TYPE, #{ses.langCd}) AS RFX_TYPE_NM , RQHD.RFX_LIMIT_CNT AS RFX_LIMIT_NUM , RQHD.RFX_SUBJECT , (RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RFX_START_DATE , (RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'HH24') AS RFX_START_HOUR , (RQHD.RFX_START_DATE, 'MI') AS RFX_START_MIN , (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS RFX_END_DATE , (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'HH24') AS RFX_END_HOUR , (RQHD.RFX_END_DATE, 'MI') AS RFX_END_MIN , RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID , GETUSERNAME(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, #{ses.langCd}) AS CTRL_USER_NM , GETUSERINFO(RQHD.GATE_CD, RQHD.CTRL_USER_ID, 'USER_TYPE') AS CTRL_USER_TYPE , RQHD.FAIL_BID_DATE , RQHD.FAIL_BID_RMK , RQHD.SETTLE_TYPE , RQHD.AMT_TYPE , RQHD.CUR , RQHD.VAT_TYPE , RQHD.EST_PRICE_TYPE , RQHD.RMK_TEXT_NUM , RQHD.ATT_FILE_NUM FROM STOCRQHD RQHD JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON( RQVN.GATE_CD = RQHD.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQHD.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQHD.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQHD.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0') WHERE RQHD.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQHD.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQHD.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQHD.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = (CASE WHEN #{ses.userType} = 'S' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{VENDOR_CD} END) AND RQHD.DEL_FLAG = '0'

SELECT RQDT.RFX_NUM , RQDT.RFX_CNT , RQDT.RFX_SQ , RQDT.BUYER_CD , RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD ,GETCOMPANYNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_NM , RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD ,GETDEPTNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_DEPT_NM ,GETBUYERDEPTNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.PR_BUYER_CD, RQDT.PR_DEPT_CD, #{ses.langCd}) AS PR_BUYER_DEPT_NM , RQDT.PURCHASE_TYPE , RQDT.ITEM_CD , RQDT.ITEM_DESC , RQDT.ITEM_SPEC , RQDT.MAKER_CD , GETMKBRNAME(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.BUYER_CD, 'MK', RQDT.MAKER_CD) AS MAKER_NM , RQDT.MAKER_PART_NO , RQDT.ORIGIN_CD , RQDT.RFX_QT AS PR_QT , RQDT.UNIT_CD , RQDT.UNIT_PRC , RQDT.ITEM_AMT AS PR_AMT ,(RQDT.DUE_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS DUE_DATE , RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM ,GETFILECOUNT(RQDT.GATE_CD, RQDT.ATT_FILE_NUM) AS ATT_FILE_NUM_CNT ,(RQDT.VALID_FROM_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_FROM_DATE ,(RQDT.VALID_TO_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALID_TO_DATE , RQDT.ITEM_RMK , RQDT.PR_NUM , RQDT.PR_SQ , RQDT.PB_BUYER_CD FROM STOCRQDT RQDT JOIN STOCRQVN RQVN ON (RQVN.GATE_CD = RQDT.GATE_CD AND RQVN.BUYER_CD = RQDT.BUYER_CD AND RQVN.RFX_NUM = RQDT.RFX_NUM AND RQVN.RFX_CNT = RQDT.RFX_CNT AND RQVN.DEL_FLAG = '0')
JOIN STOCRQSE RQSE ON( RQSE.GATE_CD = RQVN.GATE_CD AND RQSE.BUYER_CD = RQVN.BUYER_CD AND RQSE.RFX_NUM = RQVN.RFX_NUM AND RQSE.RFX_CNT = RQVN.RFX_CNT AND RQSE.RFX_SQ = RQDT.RFX_SQ AND RQSE.VENDOR_CD = RQVN.VENDOR_CD AND RQSE.DEL_FLAG = '0')
WHERE RQDT.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND RQDT.BUYER_CD = #{BUYER_CD} AND RQDT.RFX_NUM = #{RFX_NUM} AND RQDT.RFX_CNT = #{RFX_CNT} AND RQVN.VENDOR_CD = (CASE WHEN #{ses.userType} = 'S' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{VENDOR_CD} END)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO STOCQTDT ( GATE_CD , BUYER_CD , QTA_NUM , QTA_SQ , REG_DATE , REG_USER_ID , MOD_DATE , MOD_USER_ID , DEL_FLAG , RFX_NUM , RFX_CNT , RFX_SQ , VENDOR_CD , ENC_UNIT_PRC , ENC_ITEM_AMT , SW_BUS_PRICE , MNT_SANGJU_YN , CONSUMER_AMT , FC_MNT_TERM , CH_RATE , DOIB_AMT , MNT_RATE , MNT_SDAY , MNT_EDAY , MNT_GUR_MONTH , RT_INSP_PERIOD , FALT_RC_TG_TIME , ATT_FILE_NUM , ITEM_RMK , GIVEUP_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{ses.gateCd} , #{BUYER_CD} , #{QTA_NUM} , #{QTA_SQ} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , SYSDATE , #{ses.userId} , '0' , #{RFX_NUM} ,(CASE WHEN #{RFX_CNT} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{RFX_CNT} END) ,(CASE WHEN #{RFX_SQ} = '' THEN NULL ELSE #{RFX_SQ} END) ,(CASE WHEN #{ses.userType} = 'S' THEN #{ses.companyCd} ELSE #{VENDOR_CD} END) ,#{UNIT_PRC} ,#{ITEM_AMT} , #{SW_BUS_PRICE} -- [용역] SW사업대가 , #{MNT_SANGJU_YN} -- [용역] 상주여부 [코드] , #{CONSUMER_AMT} -- [물품/공사] 소비자금액 , #{FC_MNT_TERM} -- [물품/공사] 무상유지보수기간 , #{CH_RATE} -- [물품/공사] 유상요율 , #{DOIB_AMT} -- [유지보수] 도입금액 , #{MNT_RATE} -- [유지보수] 유지보수요율 ,(#{MNT_SDAY}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') -- [유지보수] 유지보수 시작일 ,(#{MNT_EDAY}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') -- [유지보수] 유지보수 종료일 , #{MNT_GUR_MONTH} -- [유지보수] 유지보수보장개월수 , #{RT_INSP_PERIOD} -- [유지보수] 정기점검주기 [M248] , #{FALT_RC_TG_TIME} -- [유지보수] 장애복구목표시간 , #{VENDOR_ATT_FILE_NUM} , #{VENDOR_ITEM_RMK} , #{GIVEUP_FLAG} )
